desc.mayor: When a roll earns you nothing, take any 1 resource card.
desc.general: On a 7, you never have to discard.
desc.explorer: Relocate one of your dead-end roads elsewhere.
desc.mendicant: Building a road, substitute any resource for the brick or lumber it costs.
desc.robberBride: Send the robber to the desert and take 1 resource from the hex it left.
desc.merchant: Demand a resource from up to 2 players; give back 1 card for each you receive.
desc.captain: Trade one chosen resource at 2:1 with the bank for the rest of the turn.
desc.noblewoman: Steal 1 resource from a player with strictly more victory points than you.
desc.architect: Buying a development card, substitute any resource for 1 required card and look at the top 3 before choosing.
desc.priest: Discard a Knight card to build a settlement or city at a reduced cost.

reason.justAcquired: You can't use a helper the turn you received it

swap.title: Swap helper
swap.instructions: Trade your current helper for one from the display, without spending a use.

dialog.boardTargetPending: Choose the target on the board.

mayor.title: Mayor
mayor.instructions: This roll earned you nothing — take any 1 resource from the bank.

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.instructions: Pick one of your dead-end roads to relocate, then where it goes.

mendicant.title: Mendicant
mendicant.instructions: Build a road, substituting any resource for the brick or lumber it normally costs.

robberBride.title: Robber Bride
robberBride.instructions: Send the robber to the desert and take 1 resource from the hex it left.
robberBride.noTargetNote: No one is adjacent to the robber's current hex — it will just move.

merchant.title: Merchant
merchant.instructions: Demand a resource from up to 2 players. For each who has it, give back 1 card of your choice.

captain.title: Captain
captain.instructions: Choose one resource to trade at 2:1 with the bank for the rest of this turn.

noblewoman.title: Noblewoman
noblewoman.instructions: Choose a player with strictly more victory points than you — you steal 1 resource from them.

architect.title: Architect
architect.instructions: Look at the top 3 development cards and choose one, substituting any resource for 1 required card.

priest.title: Priest
priest.instructions: Discard your Knight card to build a settlement or city at a reduced cost.
